description_long: This stool features a simple, round seat with a smooth, dark-colored surface, likely made of plastic or painted wood. The seat is supported by four slender, straight metal legs, each extending vertically to the ground and connected by a square metal support frame near the base for added stability. The legs are evenly spaced and have a minimalistic, utilitarian design, with no visible embellishments or decorative elements. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments such as bus stops, public parks, or waiting areas. The stool lacks a backrest and footrest, emphasizing its functional, space-saving form. Its clean lines and monochromatic palette give it a modern, industrial aesthetic.
description: A modern, round-seated stool with four straight metal legs and a square support frame, finished in dark tones. The design is minimalistic and functional, with no backrest or decorative elements.
description_view_0: The stool is seen from a slight angle, showing the round seat and all four legs with the square support frame clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the symmetry of the legs and the seat, with the square support frame appearing more aligned and the seat's edge more pronounced.
description_view_2: The stool is shown from a similar angle as previous views, with the round seat and straight legs visible, emphasizing the uniformity of the design.
description_view_3: This view mirrors the previous ones, maintaining the clear visibility of the seat and legs, with the square support frame still prominent.
